summary: Horizontal video, a clipped Fox & Friends news segment reporting that March southwest border crossings were the lowest in history, with on-screen chyrons and a graphic of a border wall (marked FILE footage). It is a TV news package narrated by anchors, with no music.
notable_text: MARCH NUMBERS SHOW MOST SECURE BORDER IN HISTORY; SW BORDER CROSSINGS FOR MARCH LOWEST IN HISTORY; TRUMP ADMIN STARTS NEW WALL CONSTRUCTION PROJECTS; FOX & FRIENDS
